conflictBlocks.oursContent:
{/* Icons */}
      <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href={faviconUrl} />
      <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href={faviconUrl} />
      <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href={faviconUrl} />
      <link rel="shortcut icon" href={faviconUrl} />
      <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href={faviconUrl} />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
{/* Icons (same-origin, versioned path) */}
      <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href={faviconPath} />
      <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href={faviconPath} />
      <link rel="shortcut icon" href={faviconPath} />
      <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href={faviconPath} />

preservedBehaviors.description: Uses a versioned PATH (e.g. /api/site-icon-v20260107) instead of query-param cache busting (?v=) for favicon URLs
All favicon link tags reference the same versioned path variable consistently across head.jsx and layout.jsx
Includes a plain icon link without explicit sizes (catch-all favicon) from ours
Layout.jsx client-side favicon uses same-origin /api/ route path
Head.jsx renders title MINERSME and theme-color #0A0F1C meta tags
Layout.jsx wraps children in QueryClientProvider with staleTime/cacheTime/retry/refetchOnWindowFocus config
